title: Prohibiting the secretary from adopting and enforcing policies for placement, custody and appointment of a custodian that may conflict with sincerely held religious or moral beliefs regarding sexual orientation or gender identity and creating a right of action for violations.
summary: Prohibiting the secretary from adopting and enforcing policies for placement, custody and appointment of a custodian that may conflict with sincerely held religious or moral beliefs regarding sexual orientation or gender identity and creating a right of action for violations.

actions.action: House Introduced
House Referred to Committee on Child Welfare and Foster Care
House Hearing: Monday, February 17, 2025, 1:30 PM Room 152-S
House Committee Report recommending bill be passed by Committee on Child Welfare and Foster Care
House Committee of the Whole - Motion to Amend - Offered by Representative Howerton
House Committee of the Whole - Amendment by Representative Howerton was adopted
House Committee of the Whole - Motion to Amend - Offered by Representative Ruiz, S.
House Committee of the Whole - Amendment by Representative Ruiz, S. was rejected Yea: 36 Nay: 84
House Committee of the Whole - Be passed as amended
House Final Action - Passed as amended; Yea: 86 Nay: 37
House Engrossed on Thursday, February 20, 2025
Senate Received and Introduced
Senate Referred to Committee on Public Health and Welfare
Senate Hearing: Wednesday, March 12, 2025, 8:30 AM Room 142-S
Senate Committee Report recommending bill be passed as amended by Committee on Public Health and Welfare
Senate Committee of the Whole - Committee Report be adopted
Senate Committee of the Whole - Be passed as amended
Senate Emergency Final Action - Passed as amended; Yea: 31 Nay: 9
House Concurred with amendments; Yea: 84 Nay: 38
House Reengrossed on Wednesday, March 26, 2025
House Enrolled and presented to Governor on Friday, March 28, 2025
House Vetoed by Governor; Returned to House on Thursday, April 3, 2025
House Motion to override veto prevailed; Yea: 87 Nay: 38
Senate Motion to override veto prevailed; Yea: 31 Nay: 9

votes.description: House Committee of the Whole - Amendment by  Representative Ruiz, S. was rejected - Yea: 36 Nay: 84
House Final Action - Passed as amended - Yea: 86 Nay: 37
Senate Emergency Final Action - Passed as amended - Yea: 31 Nay: 9
House Concurred with amendments - Yea: 84 Nay: 38
House Motion to override veto prevailed - Yea: 87 Nay: 38
